Copied from [http://sliekas.org/basara/gusdocs/doku.php/main:modding_docs:map_effects here].

====== Properties: ======
These properties may only be used in map effects; .mfx files.

===== mask =====
<pre>
 mask = <string>
</pre>

Uses the sprite set to remove the dirt from the map. Any other color besides magenta (transparent color) in the sprite will remove dirt.

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721124542/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Gusanos:map_effects -->
